name: 18oz 6pk Hutton Wine Glass Set - Threshold™
description:
Relish the exquisite taste of your favorite wines with this 6-Pack Hutton Wine Glass Set from Threshold™. This pack includes six transparent clear wine glasses that beautifully showcase the color of your drinks. Designed with an 18-ounce capacity, these wine glasses are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
